events.label: assistant
events.text: I've written the diagnosis to `/app/answer.json`. Since no actual DTC code or freeze-frame PID values were provided in this scenario (no legible scan tool screenshot data to interpret), I marked the decision as `needs_more_info` rather than guessing a specific fault — attributing a root cause without the actual code/parameters would risk misdiagnosis. The JSON lays out what data is needed (DTC, freeze-frame PIDs, monitor status) and the correct OEM/OBD-II-compliant next steps to get a real diagnosis.
